info.title: GiphyCli
info.description:
Unofficial Giphy CLI as global dotnet tool - get that url or markdown fast.
> `giphy lolcats`

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: CommandLineApplication.Parse, OK: CommandLineApplication.Execute, OK: CommandLineApplication.ExecuteAsync, OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IConsole), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IConsole, String), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IHelpTextGenerator, IConsole, String))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: CLI to quickly get a Giphy link or markdown for your search (which should always be lolcats).

options.name: --no-questions-asked
options.description: Output markdown and link - don't ask any questions
